errors.message: Argument 'status' on Field 'productChangeStatus' has an invalid value (ENABLED). Expected type 'ProductStatus!'.
Variable $status of type ProductStatus! was provided invalid value

problems.explanation: Expected "ENABLED" to be one of: ACTIVE, ARCHIVED, DRAFT

errors.message: Argument 'status' on InputObject 'ProductCreateInput' has an invalid value (PUBLISHED). Expected type 'ProductStatus'.
Variable $product of type ProductCreateInput! was provided invalid value for status (Expected "ENABLED" to be one of: ACTIVE, ARCHIVED, DRAFT)

problems.explanation: Expected "ENABLED" to be one of: ACTIVE, ARCHIVED, DRAFT

notes: Captured against real Shopify Admin GraphQL. Invalid ProductStatus values fail schema validation before productChangeStatus/productCreate resolver execution, so no products are created or status changes staged upstream.
